virtualInstrument.title: Virtuelt instrument
virtualInstrument.enabled: Virtuelt instrument aktiveret - MIDI-beskeder sendes til log

debugButton.title: Fejlfindingsknap
debugButton.description: Viser knappen til at åbne fejlfindingskonsollen

calibrationButton.title: Calibration Microphone Button
calibrationButton.description: Shows the microphone button to calibrate audio delays for instruments

lightingButton.title: Lighting Control Button
lightingButton.description: Shows the light bulb button to manage LED strips and lighting rules

playlistButton.title: Playlist Button
playlistButton.description: Shows the playlist button in the navigation bar

serialMidi.title: Seriel MIDI (GPIO)
serialMidi.description: Brug Raspberry Pi UART GPIO-pins som MIDI IN/OUT-porte (kræver hardware-kredsløb)
serialMidi.clickScan: Klik på "Scan" for at finde tilgængelige serielle porte
serialMidi.noPorts: Ingen serielle porte fundet. Kontroller UART-overlays i /boot/config.txt
serialMidi.notAvailable: serialport-pakken er ikke installeret. Kør: npm install serialport

update.title: System Update
update.description: Download and install the latest version
update.warning: Fetches latest changes, updates dependencies and restarts the server
update.confirmMessage:
The system will download the latest version, update dependencies and restart the server.

The application will be temporarily unavailable during the update.
update.success: Update complete! The server is restarting...
update.restartTimeout: Server is not responding. Please reload the page manually.

bluetooth.title: Bluetooth Instrumentsøgning
bluetooth.operationMayTakeTime: Denne handling kan tage et par sekunder
bluetooth.tip: Sørg for, at dit Bluetooth-instrument er i parringstilstand og inden for rækkevidde (maks. 10-15m), før du starter søgningen.

disabled.title: Bluetooth deaktiveret
disabled.enableMessage: Aktiver den for at scanne efter tilgængelige enheder.

forgetDevice.title: Glem denne enhed?
forgetDevice.warning: Dette vil fjerne parringen med denne enhed.

network.title: Netværksinstrumentsøgning
network.operationMayTakeTime: Denne handling kan tage et par sekunder
network.tip: Sørg for, at dit instrument er tilsluttet det samme WiFi-netværk som denne enhed og er tændt, før du starter søgningen.

invalidIP.format:
Ugyldig IP-adresse
Forventet format: xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx
Eksempel: 192.168.1.100

disconnect.title: Afbryd enhed
disconnect.message: Er du sikker på, at du vil afbryde denne enhed?
disconnect.warning: Enheden afbrydes og vil ikke længere modtage MIDI-beskeder.

midiEditor.title: MIDI-editor
midiEditor.multipleChannelsTip: Deaktiver kanaler, du ikke vil ændre
midiEditor.singleChannelRequired: Behold kun én kanal aktiv for at ændre instrumentet
midiEditor.multipleChannelsWarning: Flere kanaler aktive ({count}). Deaktiver kanalerne, du ikke vil ændre, ved at klikke på deres knapper.
midiEditor.noCCOnChannel: No CC on this channel — use tools to create some
midiEditor.noFileLoaded: Ingen fil indlæst. Åbn først en MIDI-fil.
midiEditor.cannotSave: Kan ikke gemme: editoren er ikke initialiseret
midiEditor.libraryNotLoaded: webaudio-pianoroll-biblioteket er ikke indlæst. Kontroller, at scriptet er inkluderet i index.html.
midiEditor.backendNotSupported:
Backend understøtter ikke MIDI-fillæsning endnu.

Kommandoen "file_read" skal tilføjes til backend.
Brug den klassiske editor i mellemtiden.

unsavedChanges.title: Ikke-gemte ændringer
unsavedChanges.message: Du har foretaget ændringer, der ikke er gemt.
unsavedChanges.warning: Hvis du lukker nu, vil disse ændringer gå TABT.

midiEditor.connectedDeviceTip: Vælg en udgangsenhed for at se hvilke noder den kan spille
midiEditor.saveAsDescription: Gem en kopi med nyt navn
midiEditor.drawDensityTip: Minimum spacing between points in draw mode
midiEditor.moveToChannelHint: Move selected notes to the chosen channel
midiEditor.changeInstrumentHint: Change the MIDI program of the active channel
midiEditor.previewSourceHint: Choose between original GM sound or routed instrument
midiEditor.playableNotesHint: Show notes that the routed instrument can play

ui.dropToRoot: 📂 Slip her for at flytte til rod
ui.confirmMessage: Er du sikker på, at du vil fortsætte?
ui.virtualInstrumentType: Virtuelt instrument • Beskeder sendes til log
ui.virtualInstrumentEnabled: Virtuelt instrument AKTIVERET - MIDI-beskeder vises her

Tilslut en MIDI-enhed, aktiver virtuelt instrument i indstillinger, eller opret en virtuel port.
ui.reloadingDevices: Genindlæser enheder for at inkludere virtuelt instrument...

Fejl: virtuelt instrument kunne ikke indlæses.

Genindlæs siden.
ui.mixedModeInfo: Blandet tilstand: nogle kanaler dirigeret til virtuelt instrument
ui.noMidiFilesDropped: No MIDI files found in the dropped files.
ui.duplicateFileWarning: ⚠️ Filen eksisterer allerede - vil blive overskrevet
ui.errorFileTooLarge: Filen er for stor. Kontroller filstørrelsen.
ui.errorInvalidMidi: Denne fil ser ikke ud til at være en gyldig MIDI-fil. Kontroller formatet.
ui.errorUploadTimeout: Upload tog for lang tid. Prøv venligst igen.

instrumentSettings.title: Instrumentindstillinger
instrumentSettings.serialNumberHelp: Unik identifikator til at skelne identiske enheder
instrumentSettings.syncDelayHelp: Positiv = forsinkelse, negativ = forudgående (til multi-instrument synk)
instrumentSettings.macAddressHelp: For at tilknytte indstillinger til Bluetooth-enheder
instrumentSettings.sysexHelp: Sørg for, at enheden understøtter SysEx Identity Request-beskeder.
instrumentSettings.capabilitiesHelp: Definer funktionerne for dette instrument for at optimere MIDI-routing.
instrumentSettings.noteRangeHelp: F.eks.: 88-tangenters klaver = 21 (A0) til 108 (C8). Efterlad tomt for alle toner.
instrumentSettings.clickToSelect: Klik på tangenter for at definere området
instrumentSettings.drumKitNotice: Drum kits use MIDI channel 10 and discrete note mode. These settings will be applied automatically on save.
instrumentSettings.polyphonyHelp: Maximum number of simultaneous notes (1-128). Default: 16
instrumentSettings.midiChannelHelp: MIDI channel used by this instrument (already-used channels are disabled)
instrumentSettings.commTimeoutHelp: Maximum wait time for a response (in ms)
instrumentSettings.supportedCCsHelp: Liste over CC-numre adskilt med komma. F.eks.: 1=Modulation, 7=Volume, 64=Sustain. Efterlad tomt for alle CC'er.
instrumentSettings.micNotAvailable: Microphone is not available in this browser.

playlist.title: Playlister
playlist.noPlaylists: Ingen playlister endnu. Klik + for at oprette.

lighting.midiLearnDefault: 🎹 MIDI Learn — Play a note to auto-configure the condition

lighting.velocityMinMaxError: Velocity min must be ≤ velocity max
lighting.noteMinMaxError: Note min must be ≤ note max

autoAssign.title: Auto-Assign Channels
autoAssign.analyzing: Analyzing MIDI file and matching instruments...
autoAssign.instructions: Select the instrument for each channel. The best match is pre-selected.
autoAssign.previewAdaptedTip: Preview the adapted version with transposition
autoAssign.quickAssignTip: Automatically assign all channels with best match
autoAssign.quickAssignConfirm: Quick assign will automatically select the best instrument for each channel. Continue?
autoAssign.noActiveChannels: No active channels in this MIDI file
autoAssign.duplicateInstrumentTip: This instrument is also assigned to channel(s) {channels}
autoAssign.componentNotLoaded: Auto-tildelingsmodulet kunne ikke indlæses. Opdater siden.
autoAssign.noteOffsetHint: Shift all drum notes (useful for mapping to a different kit)
autoAssign.previewChannelTip: Preview this channel with current settings
autoAssign.strategyTransposeDesc: Shift all notes to fit instrument range
autoAssign.strategyOctaveWrapDesc: Fold out-of-range notes into nearest octave
autoAssign.strategyIgnoreDesc: Play as-is (out-of-range notes may be clipped)
autoAssign.splitAvailableBanner: {count} channel(s) can be split across multiple instruments for better coverage
autoAssign.unsavedChangesMessage: You have modified instrument assignments, strategies, or transpositions that haven't been applied yet. Closing will discard these changes.
autoAssign.allChannelsSkipped: All channels were auto-skipped — no compatible instruments available. Please add or configure instruments in settings.

matrix.selectChannel: Select a channel to see its details

overview.selectChannelHint: Select a channel above to see available instruments

instrumentCapabilities.title: Complete Instrument Capabilities

instrumentCapabilities.recommendedHint: These fields improve auto-assignment quality but are not required.

instrumentCapabilities.fullSettingsHint: Access advanced configuration, latency settings, and more
instrumentCapabilities.fullSettingsComingSoon: Full instrument settings page coming soon!

drumKitsDesc.0: Versatile all-purpose kit, ideal for pop/rock/variety
drumKitsDesc.8: Ambient room reverb sound, more natural feel

drumKitsDesc.48: Timpani, orchestral bass drum, cymbals, classical/film
drumKitsDesc.56: Sound effects and noises, not a real drum kit
